welcome.title: Welcome to 极智
welcome.description: Your AI assistant is ready to be configured

complete.title: All Set!
complete.description: 极智 is ready to use

welcome.title: Welcome to 极智
welcome.description: 极智 is a graphical interface for OpenClaw, making it easy to use AI assistants across your favorite messaging platforms.

speech.title: Volcengine Realtime ASR
speech.description: The floating pet now streams audio to Volcengine realtime ASR and outputs text directly.
speech.readyDesc: The pet will connect to {{endpoint}} and use cluster {{cluster}} for realtime recognition.
speech.missing: Volcengine ASR is not configured yet
speech.missingDesc: Open Settings and fill in the App ID, Cluster, and Access Token before using floating pet voice input.
speech.firstRunHint: Configure Volcengine ASR in Settings first. After saving, press F2 to start realtime speech-to-text.
speech.firstRunReady: Volcengine ASR is ready, so future floating pet recordings will transcribe in realtime.

features.cloudWorkspace: Cloud workspace ready out of the box

runtime.title: Checking Environment
runtime.cloudOnlyDesc: This package does not include a local OpenClaw or Gateway runtime. Setup will continue against your cloud workspace.

issue.title: Environment issue detected
issue.desc: Please ensure OpenClaw is properly installed. Check the logs for details.

provider.label: Model Provider
provider.cloudOnlyTitle: Provider settings sync to the cloud
provider.cloudOnlyDesc: This is a cloud-only build, so local OpenClaw has been removed. Any provider you configure here will sync to your cloud workspace for remote runtime use.
provider.modelIdDesc: The model identifier from your provider (e.g. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3)
provider.codePlanPresetDesc: Code Plan uses https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/coding/v3 and model ark-code-latest. Do not use /api/v3 for Code Plan traffic.
provider.syncedToCloud: This configuration will also sync to your cloud workspace.
provider.storedLocally: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.

channel.title: Connect a Messaging Channel
channel.subtitle: Choose a platform to connect your AI assistant to. You can add more channels later in Settings.
channel.connectedDesc: Your channel has been configured. It will connect when the Gateway starts.

installing.title: Installing Essential Components
installing.subtitle: Setting up the tools needed to power your AI assistant
installing.cloudOnlySubtitle: Cloud-only builds skip local OpenClaw, Gateway, and Python skill downloads.

cloudOnlyItems.providers: Keep provider setup for the cloud workspace

installing.wait: This may take a few moments...

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.subtitle: 极智 is configured and ready to use. You can now start chatting with your AI assistant.
complete.footer: You can customize skills and connect channels in Settings
complete.cloudOnlyFooter: You can adjust models, channels, and cloud connection details later from Settings.
